name: /pr-corpus-update budget tracking is per-source not aggregated across all configured sources
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus && printf '{"a":{"used_today":50000},"b":{"used_today":50000}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source a --estimated-tokens 30000 --budget .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'source=a remaining=50000' out.txt && grep -q 'allowed=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
